item.title: Apple Marks 50th Anniversary 摘要
item.description:
Apple is celebrating its 50th anniversary with special animations and events. The homepage features a sketch animation of iconic products, and a VHS-style 'rewind' video highlights Apple's product history, though it's primarily accessible on iPhone via a hidden button. Additionally, Paul McCartney performed a concert at Apple Park for employees, symbolizing the resolution of past trademark disputes between Apple and The Beatles.
标签: Apple, anniversary, animation, video, product history, concert, trademark, design, marketing, technology

item.title: Hershey Says It Will Shift Back to Classic Recipe for All Reese’s Products After Criticism 摘要
item.description:
Hershey announced it will revert to classic recipes for all Reese's products starting next year, following criticism from the grandson of Reese's founder over the company's shift to cheaper ingredients. The decision was prompted by public backlash, as highlighted in a linked article, with commentary suggesting that such corporate changes often face scrutiny and that consumers should consider alternatives like Trader Joe's.
标签: Hershey, Reese's, recipe change, corporate decision, ingredient quality, consumer backlash, food industry, brand management, public relations, product reformulation

item.title: April Cools Post: New York vs Chicago Pizza 摘要
item.description:
The author discusses the Chicago vs New York pizza debate, arguing it's misguided. They note that Chicago deep dish pizza differs from stuffed pizza served by chains, with deep dish having crust, cheese, and tomato, while stuffed pizza adds an extra crust layer. The article highlights Chicago's food culture, particularly its reputation as a sausage city, and mentions related topics like April Cools submissions and comparisons to other foods like toasted ravioli.
标签: food, pizza, Chicago, culture, debate, April Cools, cuisine, regional, blogging, humor

item.title: Inside Apple’s AirPods Max 2 and the H2 Chip Upgrade 摘要
item.description:
Apple's AirPods Max 2 achieves a 1.5× improvement in active noise cancellation (ANC) without changing any physical components, according to interviews with Apple executives Tim Millet and Eric Treski. The enhancement applies across all frequency bands, not just specific ranges, meaning better performance against both low and high-pitched sounds. This builds on the original AirPods Max's strong noise-blocking capabilities, marking a significant software-driven upgrade five years after the initial release.
标签: Apple, AirPods Max 2, audio, noise cancellation, hardware, technology, product launch, consumer electronics, interview, H2 chip

item.title: Ryan D’Agostino Profiles Tim Cook for Esquire on Apple’s 50th 摘要
item.description:
This article discusses an Esquire profile of Tim Cook by Ryan D’Agostino, focusing on Cook's emotional reflections on Steve Jobs' death and his strategic engagement with the Trump administration. Cook describes his denial about Jobs' terminal illness despite the inevitability, recalling Jobs' refusal of conventional medicine. The profile also touches on D’Agostino's personal nostalgia for Apple computers, though with a minor historical inaccuracy. It highlights Cook's lengthy, candid response on Apple's political strategy, which Esquire published in full.
标签: Apple, Tim Cook, Steve Jobs, leadership, corporate strategy, technology history, interview, business, biography, politics

item.title: New Jersey, the Jackass State 摘要
item.description:
The article criticizes a social media post from the official New Jersey state account on April Fools' Day, claiming to lift the state's ban on self-service gasoline. It explains that New Jersey uniquely prohibits self-service gas statewide, requiring attendants who are often rude and slow, historically delaying change returns to discourage cash payments. The author expresses strong disdain for this policy, preferring to abandon a car rather than buy gas in New Jersey, and mocks the state for making a joke that highlights its own absurd regulation.
标签: New Jersey, gasoline, self-service ban, April Fools' Day, social media, government, regulation, consumer experience, satire, policy criticism

item.title: Ben Cohen of the WSJ Tours Apple’s Archive of Prototype Hardware 摘要
item.description:
The article references a 7-minute video showcasing Apple's archive of prototype hardware, as reported by Ben Cohen of the Wall Street Journal. It highlights previously unseen items and advises against spoiling the surprises. The content is presented through a link to Daringfireball.net, which points to the original WSJ coverage.
标签: Apple, hardware, prototypes, video, archive, WSJ, technology, design, history, news

item.title: More on Apple’s Fun ‘Rewind’ Video 摘要
item.description:
The article discusses Apple's 'rewind' video, noting that when played in reverse, it features the 'Think Different' ad music pitched up. It also covers Craig Hockenberry's pixel art fix for the '◀︎◀︎ REW' button, where he updated the modern '◀︎◀︎' symbols to match the bitmapped Chicago 12 font used for 'REW', sharing a before-and-after image of his interpretation.
标签: Apple, video, design, pixel art, typography, advertising, music, retro, UI, fix

item.title: DRAM pricing is killing the hobbyist SBC market 摘要
item.description:
Raspberry Pi announced price increases for all models with LPDDR4 RAM, including a new 3GB RAM Pi 4 priced at $83.75. The 16GB Pi 5 now costs up to $299.99. The article also references a video discussing the current state of the high-end single-board computer market for hobbyists.
标签: Raspberry Pi, hardware, price increase, single-board computer, SBC, hobbyist, memory, LPDDR4, tech news, embedded systems

item.title: 13th Year of Blogging 摘要
item.description:
The author reflects on starting a blog on April Fools' Day 13 years ago, highlighting the unexpected challenges of writing and server maintenance, especially during viral traffic. They share lessons from user feedback, including a security vulnerability revealed in their own article, and emphasize the irreplaceable value of longevity in blogging. Unlike AI-generated content, a blog's enduring presence builds a unique voice, process, and personal growth over time, serving as a lasting record of career hurdles and connections.
标签: blogging, longevity, personal-growth, server-maintenance, AI-content, writing, vulnerability, audience-engagement, side-projects, reflection
